label: frontier • cross-file rename with todo tracking and verification
query: Rename the function calc_total to compute_total across every Python file in this folder — the definition in lib.py and every usage in mod_a.py through mod_e.py — keeping behavior identical. Use a todo list to track the files and update it as you finish each one. Verify your work by running 'zsh verify.sh' and only finish once it prints ok.
notes: Multi-file refactor under todo discipline. verify.sh greps for the old name and exercises every module, so partial renames or broken imports fail the post-run command deterministically.

workspaceFiles.contents:
#!/bin/zsh
# Fails if the old name survives anywhere, or behavior broke.
if grep -rn 'calc_total' --include='*.py' .; then
  echo 'FAIL: old name calc_total still present' >&2
  exit 1
fi
python3 -c "
from lib import compute_total
import mod_a, mod_b, mod_c, mod_d, mod_e
assert compute_total([1, 2, 3]) == 6
assert mod_a.total_a([1, 2]) == 3
assert mod_b.total_b([2, 3]) == 5
assert mod_c.total_c([3, 4]) == 7
assert mod_d.total_d([4, 5]) == 9
assert mod_e.total_e([5, 6]) == 11
" || exit 1
echo ok
